descriptionOriginal: The ultimate pro laptop. MacBook Pro 16" with M4 Max delivers extreme performance for data scientists, 3D artists, and composers who push workflows to the limit.
descriptionShort: Get credit toward a new MacBook Pro laptop with the M5, M4 Pro, or M4 Max chip when you trade in an eligible Mac. Buy now at apple.com.
descriptionLong: Designed for pros like data scientists, 3D artists, and composers who constantly push workflows to the limit, MacBook Pro 16" with M4 Max empowers users to work on projects that were previously only imaginable on a desktop. M4 Max brings up to a 16-core CPU, up to a 40-core GPU, over half a terabyte per second of unified memory bandwidth. Features 16.2-inch Liquid Retina XDR display with 3456x2234 resolution, Thunderbolt 5 ports, and up to 22 hours of battery life. Supports up to 128GB unified memory for running LLMs with nearly 200 billion parameters.
